case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DIANE FELIX ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELIX, DIANE $5,721.08 PRINCIPAL, $315.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,036.98, SEE SCANNED DOC
